_meta.stability: Frozen for the loom-generation lifetime per ADR-002. Shape additions that preserve wire compatibility (new optional response fields) are allowed; breaking changes require a new generation.
_meta.relation_to_classic: No classic counterpart at the dashboard surface — get_blocked is exposed only via MCP and CLI in the classic generation. Loom is the first HTTP surface for it. Living-surface alias at /api/blocked lands per the C4 rule (no classic counterpart → alias).

shape_decl.request_type: GET (no body, no query params today; pagination params reserved for a future revision)
shape_decl.rationale: BlockedIssueLoom = SlimIssueLoom + blocked_by[]. issue_id replaces id at the entity primary key; reference ids in blocked_by keep their existing names. The unified ListResponse[T] envelope wraps every loom list endpoint per ADR-002 §6; has_more is always present (today always false because the underlying query is unbounded), next_offset is omitted when has_more is false.

examples.name: empty
examples.note: Empty project → items: [], has_more: false, next_offset omitted.
